name: Monad

VINIT.justification: It represents the initial state of existence, before differentiation.

TANCH.justification: It serves as the ultimate boundary and source of all existence.

AFWD.justification: It signifies the forward movement from the Monad into multiplicity.

AREV.justification: It represents the reverse journey back to unity.

CLINK.justification: It illustrates the interconnectedness of all emanations.

IMSCRIB.justification: It reflects the self-referential nature of the Monad.

FSPLIT.justification: It splits the Monad into various forms of existence.

FFUSE.justification: It reconstitutes the diverse emanations back into the Monad.

EVALT.justification: It affirms the successful return to the source.

EVALF.justification: It indicates failure to recognize unity.

ENGAGR.justification: It captures the paradox of being both one and many.

IFIX.justification: It records the immutable nature of the Monad.

phase_3.void_description: The state before the Monad exists, representing pure potential.
phase_3.true_description: The realization of unity and the successful return to the source.
phase_3.false_description: The state of separation and multiplicity, indicating disconnection from the source.
phase_3.both_description: The state of simultaneous existence, where unity and multiplicity coexist.

steps.domain_action: Initialize the Monad as the source of all existence.
Emanate from the Monad into diverse forms of existence.
Split the Monad into various emanations.
Affirm the realization of unity in the return journey.
Reunite the emanations back into the Monad.
Reverse the journey back to the source.
Establish the Infinite One as the ultimate boundary.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Infinite One, translating divine intentions into existence.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The flow of emanations between the Monad and its manifestations.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The eternal truth of the Monad, storing the essence of existence.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The divine timing of emanation and return.
phase_5.alfs_store: The foundational principles of unity and multiplicity.

phase_6.cycle_cost: The energy consumed in the process of emanation and return.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The state of pure potential before the Monad's emanation.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The state of unity after the return to the Monad.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The cycle maintains balance between unity and multiplicity.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → FFUSE → AREV → TANCH
-- Class: Monad
-- Fingerprint: sig=(4,2,1,0)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=False | period=7
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 4)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑾  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑼 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [4] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑗  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [5] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑙 → 𐑡  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [6] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑗 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def monad_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize the Monad as the source of all existence.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Emanate from the Monad into diverse forms of existence.)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (Split the Monad into various emanations.) / FFUSE [4] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirm the realization of unity in the return journey.)
      -- F-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙))  -- F-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.F)
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [4]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑗)  -- [4] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reunite the emanations back into the Monad.)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [5] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Reverse the journey back to the source.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑗 𐑼)  -- [6] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Establish the Infinite One as the ultimate boundary.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def monad_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (monad_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem monad_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
